title: Creepy Live-Action Anime Adaptation Set For Summer Release
content: Junji Ito has long been one of the most popular names in anime horror, with countless campfire stories from the master of horror adapted to the screen. Following the controversial release of Toonami’s Uzumaki, the manga artist’s work will once again be brought to the screen in various ways.
author: ComicBook

title: Controversial Crunchyroll Anime to Release Uncensored Version of Its Most Notorious Episode
content: Crunchyroll is now in the midst of streaming new episodes of one of their most controversial anime releases this Spring, and it turns out that the anime is planning to release an uncensored version of its most notorious episode yet.
author: ComicBook

title: Re:ZERO Season 4 Tops Spring 2026 Rankings for Second Time in a Row in Week 2
content: Re:ZERO -Starting Life in Another World- Season 4 has topped the weekly Spring 2026 anime rankings for two times in a row in the first two weeks of the season. The anime had over 10% of the total votes both times. Season 4 was voted as the most anticipated anime of the Spring 2026 season.
author: Anime Corner

title: Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves Game's Trailer Reveals April 24 Release Date for Wolfgang Krauser DLC Character
content: SNK revealed a new trailer on Friday for its Fatal Fury City of the Wolves fighting game , highlighting the DLC character Wolfgang Krauser. The character will launch in the game on April 24, coinciding with the game's first anniversary.
author: ANN

title: Dragon Ball Teases The Return of Super Saiyan 4
content: Dragon Ball Daima was a series that many anime fans didn’t see coming. Specifically, the spin-off introduced various elements and transformations that long-time shonen enthusiasts thought would never be made canon.
author: ComicBook

title: After 5 Years, Netflix Is Finally Streaming One of the Coolest Sci-Fi Anime Originals
content: Five years after it made its original premiere, Netflix is finally streaming one of the coolest original anime series that not enough fans got to see in action! Netflix has been making great strides in the last few years thanks to all of the new original and licensed anime productions they have brought to the…
author: ComicBook

title: The Simpsons to Make Major Change For Show’s Future
content: As of the writing of this article, The Simpsons has confirmed that it will run for forty seasons, becoming the longest-running North American animated series of all time. Thanks to such a long run, the Fox show has had to make some big changes to keep following the residents of Springfield.
author: ComicBook

title: The Amazing Digital Circus Expands Theatrical Run For Series Finale
content: The Amazing Digital Circus debuted in 2023 and over the course of three years, has risen in the ranks to become one of the biggest online animated originals of all time. To help prove this point, the upcoming series finale will be brought to theaters by Fathom Entertainment.
author: ComicBook

title: Criterion Channel Adds K-ON! Film in May
content: HIDIVE began streaming the film in December 2023. The movie depicts a story not told in the television series, and follows the five female members of Sakuragaoka High School's light music club on their graduation trip to England. The film opened in theaters in Japan in December 2011.
author: ANN

title: Event Report: Tanuki to Kitsune Celebrated 10th Anniversary With Anime Announcement, AnimeJapan 2026 Showcase
content: The Tanuki to Kitsune series was featured as a central highlight at the Frontier Works booth during AnimeJapan 2026 , as the franchise marks its 10th anniversary and prepares for its upcoming TV anime adaptation.
author: Anime Corner
